---
title: "RBPnet Analysis for HNRNPH1_179620582"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    fig.width = 16,
    fig.height = 12
)
```

# Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)
library(ape)
library(ggnewscale)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(tidyr)

assign(
    "is.waive",
    ggforce:::is.waive,
    envir = .GlobalEnv
)
```

# Define File Paths

```{r define-paths}
# Base path
base_path <- "/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF"

# RBPnet scores file
rbpnet_scores_file <- file.path(base_path, "results", "rbpnet_v3", "chr5_part6_rbpnet_scores.tsv")

# Phylogenetic tree file
tree_file <- file.path(base_path, "reference", "hg38.100way.commonNames.nh")

# Tree to clade mapping file
tree_clade_mapping_file <- file.path(base_path, "results", "tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv")

# Species order file
species_order_file <- file.path(base_path, "data", "Newickspeciesorder.txt")

# Target decoy ID
target_decoy <- "HNRNPH1_179620582"
```

# Load and Parse RBPnet Data

```{r load-rbpnet-data}
# Load RBPnet scores
rbpnet_data <- fread(rbpnet_scores_file, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Filter for target decoy
target_row <- rbpnet_data[decoyID == target_decoy]

if (nrow(target_row) == 0) {
    stop(paste("Decoy ID", target_decoy, "not found in RBPnet scores file"))
}

cat("Found decoy:", target_decoy, "\n")
cat("Number of species columns:", ncol(target_row) - 1, "\n")

# Function to parse RBPnet format
# Format: [score1][pos1][score2][pos2][score3][pos3] (5' splice, 3 pairs)
#         [score1][pos1][score2][pos2][score3][pos3] (3' splice, 3 pairs)
#         [score1][pos1][score2][pos2]... (intronic, variable pairs, up to 5)
parse_rbpnet_format <- function(value) {
    # Extract all [score][pos] pairs
    pattern <- "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]"
    matches <- str_extract_all(value, pattern)[[1]]
    
    if (length(matches) == 0) {
        return(list(
            splice5p_scores = c(NA, NA, NA),
            splice5p_positions = c(NA, NA, NA),
            splice3p_scores = c(NA, NA, NA),
            splice3p_positions = c(NA, NA, NA),
            intronic_scores = numeric(),
            intronic_positions = integer()
        ))
    }
    
    # Parse all pairs
    scores <- numeric()
    positions <- integer()
    
    for (match in matches) {
        score_pos <- str_match(match, pattern)
        if (!is.na(score_pos[1])) {
            scores <- c(scores, as.numeric(score_pos[2]))
            positions <- c(positions, as.integer(score_pos[3]))
        }
    }
    
    # Split into categories
    # First 3 pairs: 5' splice site
    splice5p_scores <- if (length(scores) >= 3) scores[1:3] else c(scores[1:min(3, length(scores))], rep(NA, max(0, 3 - length(scores))))
    splice5p_positions <- if (length(positions) >= 3) positions[1:3] else c(positions[1:min(3, length(positions))], rep(NA, max(0, 3 - length(positions))))
    
    # Next 3 pairs: 3' splice site
    if (length(scores) >= 6) {
        splice3p_scores <- scores[4:6]
        splice3p_positions <- positions[4:6]
    } else {
        splice3p_scores <- c(rep(NA, 3))
        splice3p_positions <- c(rep(NA, 3))
    }
    
    # Remaining pairs: intronic (up to 5 pairs)
    if (length(scores) > 6) {
        intronic_scores <- scores[7:min(17, length(scores))]  # Up to 5 more pairs = 10 values
        intronic_positions <- positions[7:min(17, length(positions))]
        # Pad to 5 pairs if needed
        if (length(intronic_scores) < 10) {
            intronic_scores <- c(intronic_scores, rep(NA, 10 - length(intronic_scores)))
            intronic_positions <- c(intronic_positions, rep(NA, 10 - length(intronic_positions)))
        }
    } else {
        intronic_scores <- rep(NA, 10)
        intronic_positions <- rep(NA, 10)
    }
    
    return(list(
        splice5p_scores = splice5p_scores,
        splice5p_positions = splice5p_positions,
        splice3p_scores = splice3p_scores,
        splice3p_positions = splice3p_positions,
        intronic_scores = intronic_scores[1:min(10, length(intronic_scores))],
        intronic_positions = intronic_positions[1:min(10, length(intronic_positions))]
    ))
}

# Get species columns
species_cols <- setdiff(names(target_row), "decoyID")

# Parse RBPnet scores for each species
all_scores_list <- list()

for (species in species_cols) {
    score_str <- target_row[[species]][1]
    parsed <- parse_rbpnet_format(score_str)
    
    # Create a data frame row with all scores
    row_data <- data.frame(
        species_id = species,
        # 5' splice site scores
        splice5p_score1 = parsed$splice5p_scores[1],
        splice5p_score2 = parsed$splice5p_scores[2],
        splice5p_score3 = parsed$splice5p_scores[3],
        # 5' splice site positions (cps1, cps2, cps3)
        cps1 = parsed$splice5p_positions[1],
        cps2 = parsed$splice5p_positions[2],
        cps3 = parsed$splice5p_positions[3],
        # Intronic scores (up to 5 pairs = 10 values)
        intronic_score1 = parsed$intronic_scores[1],
        intronic_score2 = parsed$intronic_scores[2],
        intronic_score3 = parsed$intronic_scores[3],
        intronic_score4 = parsed$intronic_scores[4],
        intronic_score5 = parsed$intronic_scores[5],
        intronic_score6 = parsed$intronic_scores[6],
        intronic_score7 = parsed$intronic_scores[7],
        intronic_score8 = parsed$intronic_scores[8],
        # 3' splice site scores
        splice3p_score1 = parsed$splice3p_scores[1],
        splice3p_score2 = parsed$splice3p_scores[2],
        splice3p_score3 = parsed$splice3p_scores[3],
        # Store intronic positions for finding max
        intronic_pos1 = parsed$intronic_positions[1],
        intronic_pos2 = parsed$intronic_positions[2],
        intronic_pos3 = parsed$intronic_positions[3],
        intronic_pos4 = parsed$intronic_positions[4],
        intronic_pos5 = parsed$intronic_positions[5],
        intronic_pos6 = parsed$intronic_positions[6],
        intronic_pos7 = parsed$intronic_positions[7],
        intronic_pos8 = parsed$intronic_positions[8],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    all_scores_list[[species]] <- row_data
}

# Combine all species data
all_scores_df <- rbindlist(all_scores_list)

cat("\nParsed RBPnet scores:\n")
cat("  Total species:", nrow(all_scores_df), "\n")
cat("  Species with valid 5' scores:", sum(!is.na(all_scores_df$splice5p_score1)), "\n")
cat("  Species with valid intronic scores:", sum(!is.na(all_scores_df$intronic_score1)), "\n")
cat("  Species with valid 3' scores:", sum(!is.na(all_scores_df$splice3p_score1)), "\n")
```

# Sanity Check: Canonical Splice Site Positions

```{r sanity-check-cps}
# Check if any canonical splice site position (cps1, cps2, cps3) is between 45-55
all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps <- FALSE

for (i in 1:nrow(all_scores_df)) {
    cps_positions <- c(
        all_scores_df$cps1[i],
        all_scores_df$cps2[i],
        all_scores_df$cps3[i]
    )
    
    # Check if any position is between 45-55 (inclusive)
    valid_cps <- cps_positions[!is.na(cps_positions) & cps_positions != -1]
    if (length(valid_cps) > 0) {
        all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps[i] <- any(valid_cps >= 45 & valid_cps <= 55)
    }
}

cat("\n=== Sanity Check: Canonical Splice Site Positions (45-55) ===\n")
cat("  Species with cps in range 45-55:", sum(all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps), "\n")
cat("  Species without cps in range 45-55:", sum(!all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps), "\n")

# Show some examples
if (sum(all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps) > 0) {
    cat("\n  Examples of species with cps in range 45-55:\n")
    examples <- all_scores_df[all_scores_df$has_canonical_cps, c("species_id", "cps1", "cps2", "cps3")]
    print(head(examples, 10))
}
```

# Calculate Highest Intronic Score for Each Species

```{r calculate-max-intronic}
# Find highest intronic score and its position for each species
all_scores_df$max_intronic_score <- NA
all_scores_df$max_intronic_pos <- NA
all_scores_df$missing_intronic <- FALSE

for (i in 1:nrow(all_scores_df)) {
    intronic_scores <- c(
        all_scores_df$intronic_score1[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score2[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score3[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score4[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score5[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score6[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score7[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_score8[i]
    )
    
    intronic_positions <- c(
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos1[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos2[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos3[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos4[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos5[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos6[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos7[i],
        all_scores_df$intronic_pos8[i]
    )
    
    # Check if intronic sequence is missing (all NA or -1.0)
    valid_intronic <- !is.na(intronic_scores) & intronic_scores != -1.0
    if (sum(valid_intronic) == 0) {
        all_scores_df$missing_intronic[i] <- TRUE
    } else {
        # Find max intronic score
        max_idx <- which.max(intronic_scores[valid_intronic])
        all_scores_df$max_intronic_score[i] <- intronic_scores[valid_intronic][max_idx]
        all_scores_df$max_intronic_pos[i] <- intronic_positions[valid_intronic][max_idx]
    }
}

cat("\nHighest intronic scores calculated:\n")
cat("  Species with max intronic score:", sum(!is.na(all_scores_df$max_intronic_score)), "\n")
cat("  Species missing intronic sequence:", sum(all_scores_df$missing_intronic), "\n")
cat("  Max intronic score range:", min(all_scores_df$max_intronic_score, na.rm = TRUE), "to", max(all_scores_df$max_intronic_score, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

# Calculate Highest 5' Canonical Splice Site Score

```{r calculate-max-css}
# Find highest 5' canonical splice site score (css) and its position (cps) for each species
all_scores_df$max_css <- NA
all_scores_df$max_cps <- NA

for (i in 1:nrow(all_scores_df)) {
    css_scores <- c(
        all_scores_df$splice5p_score1[i],
        all_scores_df$splice5p_score2[i],
        all_scores_df$splice5p_score3[i]
    )
    
    cps_positions <- c(
        all_scores_df$cps1[i],
        all_scores_df$cps2[i],
        all_scores_df$cps3[i]
    )
    
    # Find valid canonical splice site scores (not NA and not -1.0)
    valid_css <- !is.na(css_scores) & css_scores != -1.0
    if (sum(valid_css) > 0) {
        max_idx <- which.max(css_scores[valid_css])
        all_scores_df$max_css[i] <- css_scores[valid_css][max_idx]
        all_scores_df$max_cps[i] <- cps_positions[valid_css][max_idx]
    }
}

cat("\nHighest 5' canonical splice site scores calculated:\n")
cat("  Species with max css:", sum(!is.na(all_scores_df$max_css)), "\n")
cat("  Max css range:", min(all_scores_df$max_css, na.rm = TRUE), "to", max(all_scores_df$max_css, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

# Load Tree and Mapping Data

```{r load-tree-data}
# Load species order
species_order <- fread(species_order_file, header = FALSE, col.names = "tree_name")

# Load tree to clade mapping
tree_clade_map <- fread(tree_clade_mapping_file, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Merge to get ordered species IDs
ordered_species <- merge(species_order, tree_clade_map, by = "tree_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
ordered_species_ids <- ordered_species$species_id[!is.na(ordered_species$species_id)]

# Read phylogenetic tree
tree <- read.tree(tree_file)

# Create lookups
tree_name_to_clade <- setNames(tree_clade_map$clade, tree_clade_map$tree_name)
tree_name_to_species_id <- setNames(tree_clade_map$species_id, tree_clade_map$tree_name)

# Map tree tip labels
tip_to_clade <- tree_name_to_clade[tree$tip.label]
tip_to_species_id <- tree_name_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
names(tip_to_clade) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_to_species_id) <- tree$tip.label

# Map RBPnet data to tree names
tip_species_ids <- tip_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
tip_max_intronic <- all_scores_df$max_intronic_score[match(tip_species_ids, all_scores_df$species_id)]
tip_max_intronic_pos <- all_scores_df$max_intronic_pos[match(tip_species_ids, all_scores_df$species_id)]
tip_max_css <- all_scores_df$max_css[match(tip_species_ids, all_scores_df$species_id)]
tip_max_cps <- all_scores_df$max_cps[match(tip_species_ids, all_scores_df$species_id)]
tip_missing_intronic <- all_scores_df$missing_intronic[match(tip_species_ids, all_scores_df$species_id)]
names(tip_max_intronic) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_max_intronic_pos) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_max_css) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_max_cps) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_missing_intronic) <- tree$tip.label

# Format labels: [css, cps] (intronic_score, intronic_pos) !
# Build labels with canonical splice site info first, then intronic info in parentheses
tip_rbpnet_label <- character(length(tree$tip.label))

for (i in 1:length(tree$tip.label)) {
    label_parts <- tree$tip.label[i]
    
    # Add canonical splice site info if available
    if (!is.na(tip_max_css[i]) && !is.na(tip_max_cps[i])) {
        label_parts <- paste0(label_parts, " [", sprintf("%.3f", tip_max_css[i]), ", ", tip_max_cps[i], "]")
    }
    
    # Add intronic info in parentheses if available
    if (!is.na(tip_max_intronic[i]) && !is.na(tip_max_intronic_pos[i])) {
        label_parts <- paste0(label_parts, " (", sprintf("%.3f", tip_max_intronic[i]), ", ", tip_max_intronic_pos[i], ")")
    }
    
    # Add exclamation mark if missing intronic
    if (!is.na(tip_missing_intronic[i]) && tip_missing_intronic[i]) {
        label_parts <- paste0(label_parts, " !")
    }
    
    tip_rbpnet_label[i] <- label_parts
}

# Create tip data frame
tip_data <- data.frame(
    label = tree$tip.label,
    clade = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    species_id = as.character(tip_to_species_id),
    group = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    max_intronic_score = tip_max_intronic,
    max_intronic_pos = tip_max_intronic_pos,
    max_css = tip_max_css,
    max_cps = tip_max_cps,
    missing_intronic = tip_missing_intronic,
    rbpnet_label = tip_rbpnet_label,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
tip_data$group[is.na(tip_data$group) | tip_data$group == ""] <- "Unknown"

# Define color scheme for clades
clade_colors <- c(
    "Primate" = "#d95f02",
    "Euarchontoglires" = "#1b9e77",
    "Laurasiatheria" = "#7570b3",
    "Afrotheria" = "#e7298a",
    "Mammal" = "#66a61e",
    "Aves" = "#e6ab02",
    "Sarcopterygii" = "#a6761d",
    "Fish" = "#666666",
    "Unknown" = "gray50"
)

cat("\nTree data loaded:\n")
cat("  Total species in tree:", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("  Species with RBPnet scores:", sum(!is.na(tip_data$max_intronic_score)), "\n")
```

# Create RBPnet Score Matrix for Heatmap

```{r create-rbpnet-matrix}
# Create matrix with all scores (left to right: 5' splice, intronic, 3' splice)
# Column order: splice5p_score1-3, intronic_score1-10, splice3p_score1-3

score_cols <- c(
    "splice5p_score1", "splice5p_score2", "splice5p_score3",
    "intronic_score1", "intronic_score2", "intronic_score3", "intronic_score4", "intronic_score5",
    "intronic_score6", "intronic_score7", "intronic_score8", "splice3p_score1", "splice3p_score2", 
    "splice3p_score3"
)

# Create matrix
rbpnet_matrix <- as.matrix(all_scores_df[, ..score_cols])
rownames(rbpnet_matrix) <- all_scores_df$species_id

# Replace -1.0 and NA with NA for plotting
rbpnet_matrix[rbpnet_matrix == -1.0] <- NA
rbpnet_matrix[is.na(rbpnet_matrix)] <- NA

# Reorder rows to match Newick order
available_species <- rownames(rbpnet_matrix)
ordered_available <- intersect(ordered_species_ids, available_species)
other_species <- setdiff(available_species, ordered_available)
final_species_order <- c(ordered_available, other_species)
rbpnet_matrix <- rbpnet_matrix[final_species_order, , drop = FALSE]

# Map to common names
species_id_to_common <- setNames(tree_clade_map$matched_common_name, tree_clade_map$species_id)
common_names <- ifelse(
    rownames(rbpnet_matrix) %in% names(species_id_to_common),
    species_id_to_common[rownames(rbpnet_matrix)],
    rownames(rbpnet_matrix)
)
rownames(rbpnet_matrix) <- common_names

# Column names for heatmap
colnames(rbpnet_matrix) <- c(
    "5'SS-1", "5'SS-2", "5'SS-3",
    "Int-1", "Int-2", "Int-3", "Int-4", "Int-5", "Int-6", "Int-7", "Int-8",
    "3'SS-1", "3'SS-2", "3'SS-3"
)

cat("\nRBPnet matrix created:\n")
cat("  Rows (species):", nrow(rbpnet_matrix), "\n")
cat("  Columns (scores):", ncol(rbpnet_matrix), "\n")
cat("  Score range:", min(rbpnet_matrix, na.rm = TRUE), "to", max(rbpnet_matrix, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

# RBPnet Heatmap

```{r rbpnet-heatmap, fig.height=14, fig.width=16}
# Add vertical lines to separate regions
# gaps_col creates vertical lines: after column 3 (5'SS) and after column 11 (Intronic)
# This separates: 5'SS (cols 1-3) | Intronic (cols 4-11) | 3'SS (cols 12-14)
gaps_col_positions <- c(3, 11)

# Create heatmap with vertical lines separating regions and black lines between rows
pheatmap(
    rbpnet_matrix,
    color = viridis(100),
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = TRUE,
    show_colnames = TRUE,
    main = "RBPnet Scores for HNRNPH1_179620582\n(5' Splice Site | Intronic | 3' Splice Site)",
    fontsize_row = 8,
    fontsize_col = 8,
    border_color = "black",
    na_col = "grey90",
    gaps_col = gaps_col_positions
)
```

# Phylogenetic Tree with RBPnet Intronic Scores

```{r phylogenetic-tree-rbpnet, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
# Create tree plot colored by clade
p1 <- ggtree(tree, layout = "slanted", aes(color = group)) %<+% tip_data +
    theme_tree2() +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = clade_colors,
        name = "Clade",
        na.value = "gray50"
    ) +
    new_scale_color() +
    # Color tip labels by max intronic score
    geom_tiplab(
        aes(color = max_intronic_score, label = rbpnet_label),
        size = 2.5,
        show.legend = TRUE,
        offset = 0.001
    ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
        low = "blue",
        high = "red",
        name = "Max Intronic Score",
        na.value = "gray30",
        guide = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    # Add legend annotation
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = -Inf,
        y = Inf,
        label = "Annotation:\n[canonical score, canonical position]\n(intronic score, intronic position)\n! Missing Intronic Signal Above 0.02",
        hjust = 1,
        vjust = 0,
        size = 3,
        fontface = "italic"
    )

print(p1)
```

# Summary

```{r summary-info}
cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Target decoy:", target_decoy, "\n")
cat("Total species in tree:", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("Species with RBPnet scores:", sum(!is.na(tip_data$max_intronic_score)), "\n")
cat("\n=== RBPnet Intronic Scores ===\n")
if (sum(!is.na(tip_data$max_intronic_score)) > 0) {
    cat("Mean max intronic score:", sprintf("%.4f", mean(tip_data$max_intronic_score, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Max intronic score:", sprintf("%.4f", max(tip_data$max_intronic_score, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Min intronic score:", sprintf("%.4f", min(tip_data$max_intronic_score, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
```
